Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
SEO Optimization: Update all 37 student-aan-huis pages

✅ Fixed meta titles: ''Student aan huis [STAD] | Hulp Met IT''
✅ Updated meta descriptions with keyword ''Student aan huis in [STAD]''
✅ Fixed structured data: serviceType and areaServed (single city)
✅ Added FAQ Schema for Google rich snippets
✅ Added Breadcrumbs with schema markup
✅ Removed duplicate content sections
✅ Optimized section order for conversion (Hero → Diensten → Prijzen → Waarom → Proces → Reviews → FAQ)
✅ Increased sitemap priorities (0.9 for cities, 0.95 for major cities)
✅ Hero section with background image + optimized overlay

Bulk updated 36 city pages + template page.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
Bash(for city in den-haag eindhoven groningen leiden rotterdam tilburg utrecht)

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Critical business fixes: Legal compliance & pricing updates

CRITICAL FIXES:
✅ Fix pricing constants naar €14,50 model (was €13,99)
✅ Update service hours naar 09:00-21:00 (consistent overal)
✅ Verwijder fake review numbers uit schema (Google penalty risk)
✅ Voeg BTW vermelding toe bij prijzen (wettelijk vereist)
✅ Maak complete algemene voorwaarden pagina

LEGAL COMPLIANCE:
- Algemene voorwaarden volledig uitgewerkt (14 secties)
- Herroepingsrecht correct beschreven
- Aansprakelijkheid beperkt en gedocumenteerd
- Garantie voorwaarden toegevoegd
- Privacy/GDPR verwijzing
- Klachtenprocedure beschreven
- Link in footer + sitemap

PRICING FIXES:
- lib/constants.ts: Alle prijzen geüpdatet naar nieuw model
- MINIMUM_COST: €23,99 → €53,50 (3x€14,50 + €10)
- EMERGENCY rates toegevoegd (€18,50/kwartier)
- BTW notice op PricingSection
- Schema.org prijzen consistent

SERVICE HOURS:
- Constants: Mo-Su 09:00-21:00
- Footer: Ma-Zo: 09:00 - 21:00
- Consistent door hele site

REVIEWS:
- Fake AggregateRating verwijderd (1000 reviews = misleading)
- Trustpilot widget component voorbereid
- Instructies voor setup toegevoegd

FEATURES READY:
🟢 WhatsApp Business (al geïmplementeerd in StickyContactButtons)
🟢 Algemene Voorwaarden (volledig compliant)
🟢 BTW vermelding (legal compliant)
🟢 Trustpilot placeholder (ready for activation)

IMPACT:
- Legal risk geëlimineerd ✅
- Google penalty risk verwijderd ✅
- Pricing consistent ✅
- Wettelijk compliant ✅

TESTED:
✅ TypeScript type checking passed
✅ No build errors
✅ All constants updated
✅ Legal pages accessible

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\(''fix-prices.ps1'', @''
$root = ''C:\\Users\\konia\\OneDrive - Stichting Hogeschool Utrecht\\hulpmetit-nextgen\\app''
$e = [char]0x20AC
$count = 0
Get-ChildItem -Path $root -Recurse -Filter ''*.tsx'' | ForEach-Object {
    $c = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($_FullName, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\)
    if \($c.Contains\(''53,50''\)\) {
        $u = $c
        $u = $u.Replace\(\($e+''53,50 \(''+$e+''10 voorrijkosten + 3 x ''+$e+''14,50\). ''\), \($e+''14,50 per kwartier + ''+$e+''10 voorrijkosten. ''\)\)
        $u = $u.Replace\(\($e+''53,50 \(''+$e+''10 voorrijkosten + 3 x ''+$e+''14,50\).''\), \($e+''14,50 per kwartier + ''+$e+''10 voorrijkosten.''\)\)
        $u = $u.Replace\(\($e+''53,50 \(''+$e+''10 voorrijkosten + 3 x ''+$e+''14,50\)''\), \($e+''14,50 per kwartier + ''+$e+''10 voorrijkosten''\)\)
        $u = $u.Replace\(\(''begint vanaf ''+$e+''14,50 per kwartier + ''+$e+''10 voorrijkosten. Voor 1 uur betaalt u ''+$e+''69,50. Wij werken met transparante prijzen zonder verborgen kosten.''\), \(''kost ''+$e+''14,50 per kwartier, met een minimum van 3 kwartier. Voorrijkosten zijn ''+$e+''10 eenmalig. U betaalt achteraf.''\)\)
        $u = $u.Replace\(\($e+''14,50 per kwartier met een minimum van 45 minuten \(''+$e+''43,50\) plus ''+$e+''10 voorrijkosten. Een standaard bezoek van 45 minuten kost dus ''+$e+''14,50 per kwartier.''\), \($e+''14,50 per kwartier, met een minimum van 3 kwartier. Voorrijkosten zijn ''+$e+''10 eenmalig.''\)\)
        $u = $u.Replace\(\($e+''53,50''\), \($e+''14,50 per kwartier''\)\)
        if \($c -ne $u\) {
            $enc = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false
            [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($_FullName, $u, $enc\)
            $count++
            Write-Host \(''Updated: '' + $_Name\)
        }
    }
}
Write-Host \(''Total updated: '' + $count\)
''@, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\)")

Bash(/tmp/verify-update.ps1 << 'ENDOFSCRIPT'
$basePath = "C:\\Users\\konia\\OneDrive - Stichting Hogeschool Utrecht\\hulpmetit-nextgen\\app"

$files = @\(\)
$files += Get-ChildItem -Path "$basePath\\computerhulp-aan-huis-*\\page.tsx"
$files += Get-ChildItem -Path "$basePath\\student-aan-huis-*\\page.tsx"

Write-Host "=== Checking NEW patterns exist ==="
$new1 = Select-String -Path $files.FullName -Pattern 'rounded-xl border border-secondary-100 p-6 shadow-professional' -SimpleMatch
$new2 = Select-String -Path $files.FullName -Pattern 'bg-white rounded-xl border border-secondary-100 overflow-hidden' -SimpleMatch
$new3 = Select-String -Path $files.FullName -Pattern 'w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-500 to-primary-700 rounded-xl' -SimpleMatch
$new4 = Select-String -Path $files.FullName -Pattern 'w-16 h-16 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-500 to-primary-700 rounded-full shadow-primary' -SimpleMatch
Write-Host "New pattern 1 \(shadow-professional\): $\($new1.Count\) matches across $\($files.Count\) files"
Write-Host "New pattern 2 \(FAQ rounded-xl\): $\($new2.Count\) matches across $\($files.Count\) files"
Write-Host "New pattern 3 \(12x12 gradient\): $\($new3.Count\) matches across $\($files.Count\) files"
Write-Host "New pattern 4 \(16x16 gradient\): $\($new4.Count\) matches across $\($files.Count\) files"

Write-Host "`n=== Checking OLD patterns are gone ==="
$old1 = Select-String -Path $files.FullName -Pattern 'rounded-lg border border-secondary-100 p-6' -SimpleMatch
$old2 = Select-String -Path $files.FullName -Pattern 'bg-white rounded-lg border border-secondary-100 overflow-hidden' -SimpleMatch
$old3 = Select-String -Path $files.FullName -Pattern 'w-12 h-12 bg-primary-600 rounded-lg' -SimpleMatch
$old4 = Select-String -Path $files.FullName -Pattern 'w-16 h-16 bg-primary-600 rounded-full' -SimpleMatch
Write-Host "Old pattern 1 remaining: $\($old1.Count\)"
Write-Host "Old pattern 2 remaining: $\($old2.Count\)"
Write-Host "Old pattern 3 remaining: $\($old3.Count\)"
Write-Host "Old pattern 4 remaining: $\($old4.Count\)"

Write-Host "`n=== Sample from student-aan-huis-amsterdam ==="
$sample = Get-Content "$basePath\\student-aan-huis-amsterdam\\page.tsx" -Raw
if \($sample -match 'shadow-professional'\) { Write-Host "OK: shadow-professional found" } else { Write-Host "FAIL: shadow-professional NOT found" }
if \($sample -match 'bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-500'\) { Write-Host "OK: gradient found" } else { Write-Host "FAIL: gradient NOT found" }
if \($sample -match 'shadow-primary'\) { Write-Host "OK: shadow-primary found" } else { Write-Host "FAIL: shadow-primary NOT found" }
ENDOFSCRIPT)

Bash(/tmp/final-verify.ps1 << 'ENDOFSCRIPT'
$basePath = "C:\\Users\\konia\\OneDrive - Stichting Hogeschool Utrecht\\hulpmetit-nextgen\\app"

$compFiles = Get-ChildItem -Path "$basePath\\computerhulp-aan-huis-*\\page.tsx"
$studFiles = Get-ChildItem -Path "$basePath\\student-aan-huis-*\\page.tsx"

Write-Host "=== COMPUTERHULP FILES \($\($compFiles.Count\) files\) ==="
$c1 = Select-String -Path $compFiles.FullName -Pattern 'shadow-professional hover:shadow-professional-hover transition-all duration-200' -SimpleMatch
$c2 = Select-String -Path $compFiles.FullName -Pattern 'bg-white rounded-xl border border-secondary-100 overflow-hidden' -SimpleMatch
$c3 = Select-String -Path $compFiles.FullName -Pattern 'bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-500 to-primary-700 rounded-xl' -SimpleMatch
$c4 = Select-String -Path $compFiles.FullName -Pattern 'bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-500 to-primary-700 rounded-full shadow-primary' -SimpleMatch
Write-Host "Replacement 1 \(shadow-professional\): $\($c1.Count\) matches"
Write-Host "Replacement 2 \(FAQ rounded-xl\): $\($c2.Count\) matches"
Write-Host "Replacement 4 \(12x12 gradient\): $\($c3.Count\) matches"
Write-Host "Replacement 5 \(16x16 gradient\): $\($c4.Count\) matches"

# Check no old patterns remain in computerhulp
$old1 = Select-String -Path $compFiles.FullName -Pattern 'rounded-lg border border-secondary-100 p-6' -SimpleMatch
$old2 = Select-String -Path $compFiles.FullName -Pattern 'bg-white rounded-lg border border-secondary-100 overflow-hidden' -SimpleMatch
$old3 = Select-String -Path $compFiles.FullName -Pattern 'w-12 h-12 bg-primary-600 rounded-lg' -SimpleMatch
$old4 = Select-String -Path $compFiles.FullName -Pattern 'w-16 h-16 bg-primary-600 rounded-full' -SimpleMatch
Write-Host "`nOld patterns remaining in computerhulp: $\($old1.Count + $old2.Count + $old3.Count + $old4.Count\)"

Write-Host "`n=== STUDENT FILES \($\($studFiles.Count\) files\) ==="
Write-Host "These files use a different template structure."
Write-Host "Checking if target patterns ever existed..."
$s1 = Select-String -Path $studFiles.FullName -Pattern 'rounded-lg border border-secondary-100 p-6' -SimpleMatch
$s2 = Select-String -Path $studFiles.FullName -Pattern 'bg-white rounded-lg border border-secondary-100 overflow-hidden' -SimpleMatch
$s3 = Select-String -Path $studFiles.FullName -Pattern 'w-12 h-12 bg-primary-600 rounded-lg' -SimpleMatch
$s4 = Select-String -Path $studFiles.FullName -Pattern 'w-16 h-16 bg-primary-600 rounded-full' -SimpleMatch
Write-Host "Pattern 1 in student files: $\($s1.Count\)"
Write-Host "Pattern 2 in student files: $\($s2.Count\)"
Write-Host "Pattern 3 in student files: $\($s3.Count\)"
Write-Host "Pattern 4 in student files: $\($s4.Count\)"
ENDOFSCRIPT)

Bash(/tmp/batch-replace.ps1 << 'ENDOFSCRIPT'
$basePath = 'C:\\Users\\konia\\OneDrive - Stichting Hogeschool Utrecht\\hulpmetit-nextgen\\app'
$files = Get-ChildItem -Path $basePath -Directory -Filter 'student-aan-huis-*' | ForEach-Object { Join-Path $_.FullName 'page.tsx' } | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ }

$replacements = @\(
    @{ Old = 'bg-secondary-50 rounded-xl p-6 border border-secondary-200'; New = 'bg-secondary-50 rounded-xl p-6 border border-secondary-200 shadow-professional hover:shadow-professional-hover transition-all duration-200' },
    @{ Old = 'rounded-lg p-3 border border-secondary-200'; New = 'rounded-xl p-3 border border-secondary-200' },
    @{ Old = 'bg-primary-600 hover:bg-primary-700 rounded-lg'; New = 'bg-accent-500 hover:bg-accent-600 rounded-xl shadow-accent' },
    @{ Old = 'bg-secondary-100 hover:bg-secondary-200 rounded-lg'; New = 'bg-secondary-100 hover:bg-secondary-200 rounded-xl' },
    @{ Old = 'text-primary-600 bg-white hover:bg-secondary-50 rounded-lg'; New = 'text-primary-600 bg-white hover:bg-secondary-50 rounded-xl' },
    @{ Old = 'border-white/30 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg'; New = 'border-white/30 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-xl' },
    @{ Old = 'w-10 h-10 bg-primary-50 rounded-lg'; New = 'w-10 h-10 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-50 to-primary-100 rounded-xl' },
    @{ Old = 'border border-secondary-200 overflow-hidden'; New = 'border border-secondary-200 overflow-hidden shadow-professional' }
\)

foreach \($file in $files\) {
    $content = Get-Content $file -Raw
    foreach \($r in $replacements\) {
        $content = $content.Replace\($r.Old, $r.New\)
    }
    Set-Content $file -Value $content -NoNewline
}

Write-Host \("Updated " + $files.Count + " files successfully."\)
ENDOFSCRIPT)
